items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the exploratory step.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step 'Validate persona scenario #4' requires confirmation of the scenario behavior when attempting to share a template across businesses. However, there is no evidence provided that directly supports the expected outcome or the ability to simulate this scenario. The lack of concrete evidence or results from the simulation leads to an inconclusive status regarding the validation of this step.
